fields.name: Earl Grey
fields.description: Earl Grey is a timeless black tea celebrated for its bright citrus aroma and elegant flavor profile. This beloved blend is traditionally flavored with bergamot oil, extracted from the bergamot orange, which gives the tea its signature floral-citrus taste. Earl Grey has been enjoyed for generations and is named after Charles Grey, who was a British Prime Minister from the 1830s. Its smooth character makes it perfect for both morning and afternoon tea breaks, whether enjoyed plain or with a splash of milk. Discover why this iconic tea remains a favorite around the world. Get your fill today!

fields.name: Peachy Keen
fields.description: Peachy Keen is a delightful tea that combines the naturally sweet and juicy flavor of ripe peaches with a refreshing tea base. Peaches are known for their fragrant aroma and have been cultivated for thousands of years, making them one of the world's most cherished fruits. This tea offers a smooth, fruity taste that can be enjoyed hot or iced, making it a versatile choice throughout the year. Its naturally bright flavor profile creates a refreshing experience with every sip. If you're looking for a tea that tastes like summer in a cup, Peachy Keen is ready to impress. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: Encyclopaedia Britannica – Peach Fruit, United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) – Peaches Overview

fields.name: English Breakfast
fields.description: English Breakfast tea is a bold and robust black tea blend designed to complement hearty morning meals. Traditionally crafted from a combination of black teas, it is prized for its rich flavor. Black tea leaves are fully oxidized during processing, which gives them their dark color and distinctive taste. This classic tea has been a breakfast staple for generations and is often enjoyed with milk and sugar. Start your day with a cup of tradition and energy by choosing English Breakfast. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: The Tea Spot – About Tea, Wikipedia – English Breakfast Tea

fields.name: Jade Song
fields.description: Jade Song is a vibrant green tea that captures the fresh, grassy character that tea lovers crave. Green tea is made from leaves that undergo minimal oxidation, which helps them preserve their natural color and delicate flavors. Known for its smooth taste and refreshing finish, Jade Song offers a soothing tea experience that can be enjoyed any time of day. The bright green leaves produce a beautiful infusion that reflects centuries of tea-making tradition. Let Jade Song bring a touch of serenity and freshness to your daily routine. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: The Tea Association of the U.S.A. – Types of Tea, Wikipedia – Green Tea

fields.name: Kenyan Purple Leaf
fields.description: Kenyan Purple Leaf tea stands out with its naturally purple-tinted leaves, a rare characteristic in the tea world. Developed in Kenya, this unique tea variety contains anthocyanins, the same natural pigments found in blueberries and purple grapes. Its flavor is often described as smooth, lightly sweet, and pleasantly refreshing. The tea's striking color and distinctive origin make it a favorite among adventurous tea enthusiasts. Experience one of the world's most unique tea innovations with every cup of Kenyan Purple Leaf. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: Tea Research Foundation of Kenya Information on Purple Tea, Wikipedia – Purple Tea

fields.name: Lapsang Souchong
fields.description: Lapsang Souchong is a legendary black tea famous for its bold smoky flavor and unforgettable aroma. Originating in China's Fujian Province, this tea is traditionally dried over pinewood fires, giving it its signature smoky character. Unlike most black teas, Lapsang Souchong offers a rich, campfire-like taste that appeals to those seeking something truly distinctive. Its unique production process has made it one of the most recognizable specialty teas in the world. For tea drinkers who enjoy bold flavors and memorable experiences, Lapsang Souchong delivers. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: Wikipedia – Lapsang Souchong, Britannica – Tea Processing and Production

fields.name: Milk Oolong
fields.description: Milk Oolong is a luxurious tea prized for its naturally creamy aroma and silky-smooth flavor. Oolong teas are partially oxidized, placing them between green and black teas in both flavor and processing. Depending on the style, oolong oxidation can range from roughly 8% to 80%, creating a remarkable variety of taste experiences. Milk Oolong is especially loved for its buttery notes and velvety finish that seem almost dessert-like without added sweetness. Treat yourself to a tea experience that feels both indulgent and sophisticated. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: Open Door Tea – What Is Oolong Tea?, Wikipedia – Oolong Tea

fields.name: Vanilla Velvet
fields.description: Vanilla Velvet combines the comforting sweetness of vanilla with the smooth elegance of fine tea. Vanilla comes from the cured seed pods of orchids, making it one of the most labor intensive and treasured flavors in the world. Its rich aroma has made vanilla a beloved ingredient in desserts, beverages, and gourmet creations for centuries. Every cup delivers a warm, creamy flavor profile that feels both luxurious and inviting. When you want a tea that wraps you in comfort, Vanilla Velvet is the perfect choice. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: Smithsonian Magazine – The History of Vanilla, Wikipedia – Vanilla

fields.name: White Peony
fields.description: White Peony is a delicate white tea crafted from young tea leaves and unopened buds. White tea is one of the least processed tea varieties, undergoing minimal oxidation and handling after harvest. This gentle production method helps preserve its subtle floral notes and naturally smooth character. White Peony is admired for its light body, elegant aroma, and refreshing finish that appeals to both new and experienced tea drinkers. Experience the beauty of simplicity with every cup of White Peony. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: Wikipedia – Bai Mudan (White Peony Tea), The Tea Association of the U.S.A. – White Tea Information

fields.name: Winter Forest
fields.description: Winter Forest is an inviting tea blend inspired by the crisp air and comforting aromas of a peaceful woodland retreat. Carefully selected ingredients create a balanced flavor profile that feels both refreshing and cozy. The blend's rich aroma evokes images of evergreen trees, snowy landscapes, and relaxing winter evenings. Whether enjoyed beside a fireplace or during a busy day, Winter Forest provides a moment of calm and warmth. Escape into nature's embrace with every soothing sip. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: The Tea Association of the U.S.A. – Herbal Tea Information, Britannica – Tea and Herbal Infusions

fields.name: Cinnamon
fields.description: Cinnamon tea offers a warm, spicy flavor that has delighted tea drinkers for generations. Cinnamon is harvested from the inner bark of cinnamon trees and has been valued as a prized spice since ancient times. Its naturally sweet aroma and bold flavor make it an excellent choice during chilly mornings or relaxing evenings. Beyond its comforting taste, cinnamon's rich history spans cultures across Asia, Europe, and the Middle East. Add a little spice to your day with a cup of our flavorful Cinnamon tea. Get your fill today!

fields.name: Jasmin Yin Cloud
fields.description: Jasmin Yin Cloud is a beautifully fragrant tea infused with the enchanting aroma of jasmine blossoms. Traditional jasmine teas are often scented by layering tea leaves with fresh jasmine flowers, allowing the leaves to naturally absorb their floral fragrance. This centuries-old technique creates a delicate balance between the tea's natural flavor and the sweet scent of jasmine. The result is a smooth, aromatic tea that delivers elegance and tranquility in every cup. Elevate your tea experience with the graceful charm of Jasmin Yin Cloud. Get your fill today!
fields.sources: Wikipedia – Jasmine Tea, The Tea Association of the U.S.A. – Tea Varieties and Processing
